content:
# Regression Analysis

**Summary**: A statistical process for estimating the relationships among variables.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-latif|Latif, 2015]] used regression analysis to develop GMPEs for peak ground acceleration and spectral acceleration.

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] applied regression-analysis to determine the influence of weather parameters on evaporation rates.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] applied regression-analysis to determine the influence of weather parameters on evaporation rates.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Regression results were used to derive coefficients for magnitude, distance, and site condition scaling. ([[2015-latif|Latif, 2015, p. 40]])

- Weather data accounted for up to 79.5% of the variance in evaporation measurement during spring. ([[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016, p. 64]])
